title: Attack on Kuwait Airport Further Upends Mideast Travel Amid U.S.-Iran Conflict
summary_full: Airports in Kuwait, Iraq, Bahrain, the U.A.E. and Iran, some with military functions and some without, have all come under fire.
summary_public: Airports in Kuwait, Iraq, Bahrain, the U.A.E. and Iran, some with military functions and some without, have all come under fire.
